meta.title: Projects
meta.subtitle: A collection of industry-level platforms and AI-driven applications focused on backend scalability, LLM integration, and robust system architecture.
meta.description: Detailed portfolio of projects showcasing expertise in Java Spring Boot, Node.js, AI model fine-tuning, complex database modeling (3NF), and secure OAuth 2.0 implementations.

projects.title: Talent Pulse AI
projects.shortDescription: An AI-powered online skill-assessment platform with automated question generation and complex performance tracking.
projects.longDescription: Talent Pulse AI is a comprehensive skill-assessment ecosystem. It features a sophisticated backend capable of handling complex evaluation workflows, automated content generation via LLMs, and a highly optimized relational database structure to support large-scale enterprise testing.

problem.summary: Manual question creation was slow and prone to errors, while complex reporting queries suffered from high latency.
problem.whyItMatters: Efficient talent assessment requires rapid content generation and real-time data insights to stay competitive in HR tech.

solution.approach: Built a hybrid backend using Java Spring Boot and Node.js with a custom-built OAuth 2.0 layer and Gemini LLM integration.
solution.architecture: Micro-services inspired layered architecture with a hybrid ORM + Raw SQL data access layer.
solution.tradeoffs: Used raw SQL for complex reporting to gain 30% performance at the cost of database abstraction.

features.title: AI Question Automation
features.description: Integrated Gemini LLM API to automate the manual question-creation workflow.
features.impact: 80% reduction in manual content creation time

features.title: Custom Auth Ecosystem
features.description: Developed Google and LinkedIn OAuth 2.0 login systems from scratch without external libraries.
features.impact: Higher security and full control over the auth handshake

challenges.challenge: Optimizing complex queries across 50+ relational tables.
challenges.solution: Implemented a hybrid approach using raw SQL for performance-critical assessment reporting.
challenges.learning: Abstraction layers like ORMs have limits in high-performance data reporting scenarios.

metrics.reliability: Full RBAC and secure JWT-based session management

confidentiality.notes: Core architecture and live deployment details are proprietary to Keshav Encon Pvt. Ltd.

custom.heading: Key Highlights
data: Implemented custom OAuth 2.0 without external libraries
Achieved 30% performance improvement in complex queries
Automated 80% of question creation workflow using Gemini LLM
Built enterprise-ready architecture with 50+ normalized tables

projects.title: ResumeeAI
projects.shortDescription: An intelligent resume builder powered by a fine-tuned Mistral LLM for industrial-standard resume generation.
projects.longDescription: Developed during an internship, this project involved fine-tuning a local Mistral LLM on 45,000+ resumes to provide intelligent suggestions, dynamic uploads, and real-time data updates for job seekers.

problem.summary: Standard resume builders lacked the intelligent context needed to match industrial data standards and 3NF database efficiency.
problem.whyItMatters: Users need resumes that are not just formatted, but content-optimized for modern ATS systems.

solution.approach: Fine-tuned Mistral LLM and utilized Gemma API for data extraction, backed by a 3NF normalized database.
solution.architecture: RESTful API architecture using Java Spring Boot and JDBC for direct data handling.
solution.tradeoffs: Fine-tuning locally increased initial dev time but eliminated recurring API costs for LLM inference.

features.title: LLM Fine-tuning
features.description: Fine-tuned Mistral LLM on a dataset of 45,000+ resumes.
features.impact: Highly accurate resume content generation and parsing

features.title: Dynamic Data Extraction
features.description: Automated extraction of fields from resumes using Gemma API and Google Colab.

challenges.challenge: Structuring unstructured resume data into a 3NF database.
challenges.solution: Conducted field analysis across 50+ websites to define industrial-standard entities.
challenges.learning: Data cleaning is 70% of the effort in AI-driven applications.

custom.heading: Project Achievements
data: Fine-tuned Mistral LLM on 45,000+ resume dataset
Analyzed 50+ competitor websites for industrial standards
Eliminated recurring API costs through local LLM deployment

projects.title: Custom Industrial CRM
projects.shortDescription: A scalable Customer Relationship Management tool designed for industrial standards and maintenance.
projects.longDescription: Designed and implemented a custom CRM from scratch, focusing on 3NF principles to ensure robust data integrity and maintainability for long-term industrial use.

problem.summary: Off-the-shelf CRMs often fail to meet specific industrial data relationship requirements and are hard to scale.
problem.whyItMatters: Industrial clients need systems that can scale without requiring frequent database refactoring.

solution.approach: Built a custom database schema aligned with specific industrial workflows and client requirements.
solution.tradeoffs: Custom development took longer than configuration but resulted in 100% feature alignment.

features.title: Custom Database Design
features.description: Implemented a from-scratch database following 3NF principles for high integrity.
features.impact: Eliminated data redundancy and improved search speed

challenges.challenge: Aligning technical schema with complex client business logic.
challenges.solution: Used detailed entity-relationship modeling before coding.
challenges.learning: Architecture is as important as the code itself.

metrics.performance: Optimized for fast client data retrieval

custom.heading: Technical Highlights
data: Designed custom database schema following 3NF principles
Built from-scratch architecture for 100% feature alignment
Created easily extensible system for new modules
